games.name: Color Yarn Sort
games.description: Color Yarn Sort is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you need to sort colorful spools of yarn into their matching buckets. The challenge? You have limited space to place the buckets, and you must think carefully about which bucket to move forward. Each yarn color must be placed in its corresponding bucket, but you can only move the buckets into the available spaces&amp;mdash;there&amp;rsquo;s no room for error!
games.instructions: The goal is to match the yarns with their respective colored buckets You can only move one bucket at a time and each bucket takes up a space If you place a bucket incorrectly you rsquo ll lose a space Once all the spaces are filled you rsquo ll lose

games.name: Wordix
games.description: Wordix is an engaging logic game where your task is to guess the word within a limited number of attempts. It&amp;rsquo;s the Russian version of the popular game Wordle, but with one important difference: the words are chosen from a pre-prepared list, and you can play as much as you want without waiting for a new word each day. The game develops your thinking skills, expands your vocabulary, and provides an entertaining way to spend time. It&amp;rsquo;s suitable for both children and adults. Simple rules make the game accessible to everyone, and color-coded hints help you find the correct answer faster.
games.instructions: Input Type letters or tap keys on the virtual keyboard Submit Press Enter to submit your guess Delete Use Backspace to erase a letter Hints Green correct letter and position Yellow correct letter wrong position Gray letter not in the word
